title: Lukydium - Optimization and Graphics Modpack
description: The best optimization and graphics mods for a beautiful and/or realistic experience [1.21.4 - 1.21.5]
body:
# 🔧 Lukydium – Realistic & Optimized Modpack [1.21.4 - 1.21.5]

Experience Minecraft 1.21.4 like never before, with stunning visuals, optimized performance, and quality-of-life improvements.

This modpack focuses on:
- ⚙️ High performance  
- 🌄 Beautiful and/or realistic graphics  
- 🛠️ Quality-of-life enhancements (no gameplay changes)
- 🖥️ Multiple backend support: Sodium, Nvidium, or Vulkan  

---

## 💻 Available Versions

You can choose the best version based on your graphics API or preferences:

1. **Base Version (Sodium)**  
   Ideal for most systems — uses **Sodium** and **Iris** for great performance and shaders.

2. **Nvidium Version** (soon)  
Designed for NVIDIA GPUs — uses **Nvidium** alongside Sodium, with all compatible optimization mods.  
Offers significantly better performance, especially on **NVIDIA GeForce GTX/RTX series 16, 20, 30, 40, and 50** GPUs.

3. **Vulkan Version** (soon)  
   For more advanced optimization, use **VulkanMod**, compatible with **AMD**, **NVIDIA**, and **Intel** GPUs.  
   ⚠️ *Note: This version is **not compatible with shaders.***
---

## 🧩 Included Mods

<details>
<summary>Click to view the full list of mods</summary>

- BetterF3 – Customizable and improved debug screen
- Better Stats – Cleaner display of player statistics
- Bobby – Loads chunks even when they're offline
- C2ME – Multithreaded chunk loading and generation
- Chat Heads – Shows player icons in chat
- Chunky – UI-based chunk pregenerator
- Cloth Config – Config screen library
- Clumps – Groups XP orbs to reduce lag
- Dynamic FPS – Reduces resource usage in background
- Enhanced Block Entities – Improves rendering of block entities
- Entity Culling – Hides entities not visible to the camera
- Entity Model Features – Adds cosmetic features to entities
- Entity Texture Features – Adds random texture variants
- Fabric API – Core modding library for Fabric
- Fabric Language Kotlin – Kotlin support for Fabric
- Fabrishot – Take ultra-high-resolution screenshots
- FerriteCore – Reduces memory usage
- Gamma Utils – Advanced brightness control
- ImmediatelyFast – Immediate rendering optimization
- Iris Shaders – Adds advanced shader support
- LambDynamicLights – Dynamic lighting from entities
- Lithium – General-purpose performance optimizations
- ModernFix – Reduces stutter and improves stability
- Mod Menu – Easy mod management menu
- More Culling – Enhanced entity and object culling
- Noisium – Optimization mod improving performance.
- NotEnoughAnimations – Adds missing third-person animations
- Placeholder API – Dynamic variables for other mods
- Reese's Sodium Options – Better UI for Sodium settings
- Resourcify – Dynamic resource pack control
- Skin Layers 3D – Adds 3D depth to player skins
- Sodium Extra – Extra features and settings for Sodium
- Sodium – High-performance rendering engine
- Spark – Performance profiler and analyzer
- TCDCommons – Shared library for several mods
- Wavey Capes – Animated, fluid capes
- Yet Another Config Lib v3 – Config library
- Zoomify – Smooth and customizable zoom

</details>

---

## 🎨 Resource Packs

<details>
<summary>Click to view the resource packs</summary>

- Fresh Animations – Smooth mob animations overhaul
- Detailed Animations Reworked – Extra-detailed animations for entities
- Angel's Weather – Realistic weather textures

</details>

---

## ✨ Shaders Included

<details>
<summary>Click to view the shaders</summary>

- BSL Shaders – Stylized shader with soft lighting
- Complementary Reimagined – Realistic and immersive shader
- Super Duper Vanilla – Cartoon shader inspired by Mojang’s trailer

</details>

---

## 🎬 Video Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ve6GJzbe9V0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

📌 *This video presents the main mods optimizations and visual mods included in the pack, this one is very inspired by this video : [Best Minecraft Mods For Maximum FPS Boost](https://youtu.be/MJW4igOU_J8?si=MAD2WKj9UdiavV4h) from Shulkercraft.*  
📊 *It also shows performance benchmarks using **Nvidium** on **Minecraft 1.20.4** for comparison.*

## 🧾 Credits

All included mods, resource packs, and shaders are the property of their respective creators.  
This modpack simply assembles and configures them for performance and visual enhancement.

---

## 📁 Installation

You can install the pack easily via:
- **Modrinth App**  
- **Prism Launcher**  
- Or manually by importing the `.mrpack` file

---

Happy crafting!  
— *Lukystalme*
